title: Thumbs Up Rattan 4 Drawer Plastic Storage Tower - Mushroom
features: Ideal for storing clothing, accessories, tools, sports equipment, cleaning supplies and lots more
Measures 87cm in height, 40cm width and 39cm length
description: Ideal for storing a whole manner of items around the home including clothing, accessories, tools, sports equipment, or cleaning supplies, this 4 Drawer Rattan Storage Tower is an essential must-have for any busy household. Not only that, it wouldn't look out of place in a home office or even a bathroom for storing essential items. Made from strong, durable plastic it's easy to clean and is sturdy enough to hold a hefty amount of items, and the rattan detail adds a stylish finishing touch.
